source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A greeting card is 6 inches wide and 8 inches tall. Point A is 3 inches from the fold, as shown. As the card is opened to an angle of 45 degrees, through how many more inches than point A does point B travel? Express your answer as a common fraction in terms of $\pi$. <image1>
